description: A multi-site security facility has suffered a breach. The overnight security operations team has been disbanded and cameras have been left unconfigured. Restore full surveillance capability for incident response by enabling continuous 24/7 recording on all cameras that currently lack a recording schedule. Update the user account 'security.operator' with the full name 'Night Watch Commander' and email 'nightwatch@facility-security.com'. Create a new user account with login 'incident.cmdr', full name 'Incident Commander', email 'incident@facility-security.com', and role 'Viewer'. Create a layout named 'Incident Command Center' containing the Parking Lot Camera, Entrance Camera, and Server Room Camera. The facility runs Nx Witness VMS at https://localhost:7001. Login: admin / Admin1234!
